title: Bounded Promise Concurrency, Queueing, Ordering, Backpressure, and Cancellation · Inference Brief: Pokedex Ts Scheduler Tests
summary: Promise.all launches one fetch per result, queues grow without limits, abort rejects the aggregate and hides partial evidence, completion order changes output, and background rejections escape. Predict the user decision, runtime value, strict type claim, promise state, API boundary, failure, and observable evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the pokedex ts scheduler tests increment in bounded abortable detail-prefetch scheduler. Learners progress throu…
objectives: Use deferred Promises to force saturation, reordered settlement, abort, duplicate, partial failure, queue drain, and zero-unhandled-rejection evidence.
Choose stable input-order or labeled completion-order results and preserve per-item failures without corrupting visible state.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.instruction:
